The code contains no dynamic behavior, no external data handling beyond the provided parameters, and no signs of obfuscation or malicious intent.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmed Issues:\n- **Presence of issues?**  \n  No. All reports agree that the code is standard, boilerplate, and free of malicious or suspicious behavior.
